comparison_to_psi: Phase Ψ found ~80% irreducible lexical residual; Phase Φ shows that residual IS the free choice within the (weak, frequency-dominated) constraints — ~8.50 bits/draw of lexical freedom that the discovered structure does not reduce
finding: after ALL discovered constraints, ~8.50 bits/draw of lexical choice remain free (~80% of the uniform choice) — the constraints do not derive the actual choices
